title: Innodata Announces New Leadership Appointments to Support Next Phase of Growth
text: INOD Management Team Leadership and Executive Changes. Key Executives: Jack S. Abuhoff—Chairman and CEO since September 15, 1997. Appointed Chairman in November 2025. Rahul Singhal—President and Chief Revenue Officer. Formerly Chief Product Officer, promoted to define overall product strategy, roadmap, and go-to-market execution across AI, data engineering, and digital transformation businesses. Marissa Espineli—Interim CFO. Board Leadership Changes (November 2025): CEO Jack Abuhoff appointed as Chairman. Stewart Massey, director since 2009, appointed Lead Independent Director. Two new board members: Daniel H. Callahan (40+ years leadership at Citigroup, Morgan Stanley, IBM). General (Retired) Richard D. Clarke (retired four-star U.S. Army general). Management Team: Seasoned and experienced with 15.1 years average tenure among executives.
